prompt: DateTimeParseException is thrown when parsing the date. What is the bug?
choices: LocalDate.parse cannot handle dates with a year later than 2023
LocalDate.parse(String) expects ISO-8601 format yyyy-MM-dd; "15-03-2024" is dd-MM-yyyy which does not match, causing DateTimeParseException
LocalDate.parse requires the month as a name, not a number
parse must be called on a DateTimeFormatter, not LocalDate
explanation: The single-argument LocalDate.parse() expects ISO-8601 format: yyyy-MM-dd (e.g. "2024-03-15"). The string "15-03-2024" has day and year swapped. Fix: LocalDate.parse("2024-03-15") or LocalDate.parse("15-03-2024", DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("dd-MM-yyyy")).
